gpu: AMD Radeon RX 6600 (radeonsi, navi23, LLVM 21.1.6, DRM 3.64, 6.18.9-arch1-2)
notes: Put simply, the moment the game window exists, my GPU driver crashes. Checking journalctl, the moment the game window opens, it page faults.
